query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partners) as partner_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM opportunities) as opportunity_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobs) as job_count;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM opportunities) as opportunity_count,
